chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 2105 of 2016 a/w Suit No. 1764 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge For examination of parties/settlement of issues 02.06.2023 Mian Mushtaq Ahmed, Advocate for Plaintiff Mr.Zeeshan Ali Memon, Advocate ---------- Counsel for the Plaintiff in Suit No.2105/2016 and Plaintiff’s Counsel in Suit No.1764/2017 have moved separate Applications for withdrawal of the Suits. Applications are granted. The Suits are deemed to be withdrawn with no order as to costs. Order accordingly. J U D G E Ashraf
